diplomacy.message.coalition_proposal.con: I think an alliance would benefit both of us.
diplomacy.message.ceasefire_proposal.con: I am ready to stop this war if you are.
diplomacy.message.coalition_rejection.co: I am not ready to form an alliance with you.
diplomacy.message.coalition_break_notice: I am ending our alliance effective immediately.
diplomacy.message.war_declaration.conten: I am declaring war on you.
diplomacy.message.ceasefire_rejection.co: I will not agree to a ceasefire right now.
diplomacy.message.greeting_friendly_hell: I come in peace and greet you warmly.
diplomacy.message.greeting_formal_introd: I am reaching out to introduce myself properly.
diplomacy.message.greeting_sign_of_admir: I respect what you have built and wanted to say so directly.
diplomacy.message.warning_keep_out_of_ou: I want you to stay out of our sector.
diplomacy.message.warning_do_not_interfe: I advise you not to interfere in our affairs.
diplomacy.message.warning_general_threat: I will answer further provocation with force.
